# pangolin_site_resources (Data Source)

Retrieves the list of private site resources for the organization.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "pangolin_site_resources" "all" {}

output "site_resource_names" {
  value = [for sr in data.pangolin_site_resources.all.site_resources : sr.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `site_resources` (Attributes List) List of private site resources. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--site_resources))

<a id="nestedatt--site_resources"></a>
### Nested Schema for `site_resources`

Read-Only:

- `alias` (String) The internal DNS alias.
- `auth_daemon_mode` (String) Auth daemon mode.
- `auth_daemon_port` (Number) Auth daemon port.
- `destination` (String) The destination.
- `disable_icmp` (Boolean) Whether ICMP is disabled.
- `id` (Number) The numeric site resource ID.
- `mode` (String) The mode (host or cidr).
- `name` (String) The resource name.
- `nice_id` (String) The human-readable ID.
- `site_id` (Number) The parent site ID.
- `tcp_port_range` (String) TCP port range.
- `udp_port_range` (String) UDP port range.
